name: Radiant Prism (Major)
description:
Any armor or weapon this glass prism is affixed to glows softly with shifting colored lights. The spell DC of any spell cast by activating this item is 43.

  • Armor(light) After you cast an abjuration spell by activating the prism, you glow with dim light in a multitude of shimmering hues, shedding light like a torch and making you for 2 rounds.
  • Weapon After you cast an abjuration spell by activating the prism, your Strikes with the weapon gain the greater brilliant property rune until the end of your next turn. The damage from this rune increases to 3d4 of each type.
